name: magicinfo-performance-tests
description: K6 performance tests simulating 200 screens connecting to MagicInfo Server

scripts.test:smoke: k6 run --env ENV=smoke  --env MAGICINFO_BASE_URL=http://localhost:7001 --env MAGICINFO_USERNAME=admin tests/scenarios/screen-simulation.js
scripts.test:load: k6 run --env ENV=load   --env MAGICINFO_BASE_URL=http://localhost:7001 --env MAGICINFO_USERNAME=admin tests/scenarios/screen-simulation.js
scripts.test:stress: k6 run --env ENV=stress --env MAGICINFO_BASE_URL=http://localhost:7001 --env MAGICINFO_USERNAME=admin tests/scenarios/screen-simulation.js
scripts.test:soak: k6 run --env ENV=soak   --env MAGICINFO_BASE_URL=http://localhost:7001 --env MAGICINFO_USERNAME=admin tests/scenarios/screen-simulation.js
